nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Entry point. POST JSON body: { "prompt": "Your business idea prompt here" }

nodes.name: GPT-4o Mini - Generate Idea
nodes.notes: CREDENTIAL SETUP: Create an n8n HTTP Header Auth credential named 'OpenAI API Key'. Header Name: Authorization | Header Value: Bearer sk-YOUR_KEY

nodes.name: Gemini 1.5 Flash - Format & Structure
nodes.notes: CREDENTIAL SETUP: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Google AI Studio API Key'. Header Name: x-goog-api-key | Header Value: YOUR_GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_KEY

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Log Initial Entry
nodes.notes: CREDENTIAL SETUP: Create a Google Sheets OAuth2 credential. SPREADSHEET: Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID with your Sheet ID (found in the URL). Sheet tab must be named 'Pipeline' with headers in row 1 matching the 13-column schema.

nodes.name: Critique Loop - Increment Cycle
nodes.notes: ⚠️ LOOP TARGET: The FALSE output of 'IF - Exit Loop' connects BACK to this node. This creates the critique loop (max 3 cycles).

nodes.name: Claude - Critique & Decide
nodes.notes: CREDENTIAL SETUP: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Anthropic API Key'. Header Name: x-api-key | Header Value: YOUR_ANTHROPIC_KEY. Model set to claude-opus-4-6 — adjust as needed (claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022 also works well here).

nodes.name: IF - Exit Loop
nodes.notes: TRUE branch (approved OR cycles≥3) → Perplexity Research. FALSE branch → loops back to 'Critique Loop - Increment Cycle'. The FALSE output connection must be manually drawn back to that node after import.

nodes.name: Perplexity Sonar - Research & Validate
nodes.notes: CREDENTIAL SETUP: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Perplexity API Key'. Header Name: Authorization | Header Value: Bearer pplx-YOUR_KEY. Uses 'sonar' model (Perplexity Sonar base).

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Update Research Results
nodes.notes: Uses Row ID to match and update the existing row. The 'matchingColumns' field is set to Row ID — ensure column A is 'Row ID' in your sheet.
